name: Thermal Soarer
description: Passive design: lightweight 2m thermal glider for slope/thermal flying. No motor — hand launch or bungee.
citation: rAviExp passive pipeline. Glider mission — pure aerodynamic efficiency, no power system.

assumptions._comment: These are the ONLY user inputs. Everything else is derived.
assumptions.mission: thermal soaring, slope lift, hand or bungee launch
